attributes.description: Alerts when consecutive RDB / AOF rewrite failures are detected. Durability is at risk.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Shard persistence failures

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise shard persistence failures

### What fired
Max of RDB or AOF consecutive failures > 0.

### Why it matters
Persistence failures risk data loss during shard restarts or failovers. Usually caused by disk space, IOPS, or COW overhead.

### Triage
1. Check disk space and I/O on the node.
2. Inspect fork memory headroom.

### Remediation
- Free disk or grow node memory.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-zero failure count.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_rdb_saves_consecutive_failures IS NOT NULL
    OR redis_aof_rewrites_consecutive_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    max_rdb_failures = MAX(redis_rdb_saves_consecutive_failures),
    max_aof_failures = MAX(redis_aof_rewrites_consecutive_failures)
  BY redis, bdb, node, cluster
// Alert when consecutive RDB or AOF persistence failures are detected
// Persistence failures risk data loss during shard restarts or failovers
// Investigate disk space, I/O throughput, and memory for copy-on-write overhead
| WHERE COALESCE(max_rdb_failures, 0) > 0
    OR COALESCE(max_aof_failures, 0) > 0
| SORT COALESCE(max_rdb_failures, 0) DESC
